name: Multi-Source Research Agent with Knowledge Synthesis
description: Takes a research question, queries multiple knowledge domains via Exa search, uses Claude AI to synthesize findings with cross-referencing like a GraphRAG knowledge base, and posts a comprehensive answer with sources to Slack. Adapted from n8n's InfraNodus GraphRAG chatbot agent.

source.originalName: Telegram AI chatbot agent with InfraNodus GraphRAG knowledge base

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for multi-domain web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the synthesized answer

question.description: The research question to investigate across multiple knowledge domains

domains.description: Comma-separated knowledge domains to search (e.g. academic, industry, news, technical)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the research findings

steps.name: Search across all knowledge domains via Exa
Compile all domain search results into knowledge base
Build Claude prompt for knowledge synthesis
Build Slack Block Kit research report
